content.text:
All 27 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added a guard at the start of the items loop in `quote()` that throws `Error(\`Unknown item type: ${item.type}\`)` when `item.type` is not a key of `BASE_PRICES`.
- Result: All tests now pass (27 passing, 28 todo).
- Approach: Minimal - a single 3-line `if` block placed before the component/regular branching so any unknown type is rejected before further processing. Uses `in BASE_PRICES` rather than `!BASE_PRICES[item.type]` to avoid false positives on a hypothetical zero-priced item.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
